zh.lifeSummary: 當Christiana de Birtles於1265年出生在英國爾奧維時，她的父親Henry de Birtles30歲，母親Christian of Birties25歲。她於1278年與Roger de Mainwaring在英國英格蘭爾結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1334年在英國爾享年69歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Christiana de Birtles于1265年出生在英国爾奧維时，她的父亲Henry de Birtles30岁，母亲Christian of Birties25岁。她于1278年与Roger de Mainwaring在英国英格兰爾结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1334年在英国爾享年69岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Birtles
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: (i) locative name from Birtles (Cheshire). (ii) post-medieval variant of Birtle with excrescent -s.

variants.name: Brittles
meanings: English: (i) variant of Birtles with metathesis of -ir- to -ri-. (ii) variant of Brettell with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Birtle
meanings: English: locative name from Birtle (Lancs). The name may sometimes have been confused with   Bartle  .

nameMeanings.name: Christiana
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval learned feminine form of Christian . As a recent revival it represents an elaborated form of Christina . It is also sometimes spelled Christianna , under the influence of the name Anna .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When Christiana de Birtles was born in 1265, in Over, Cheshire, England, her father, Henry de Birtles, was 30 and her mother, Christian of Birties, was 25. She married Roger de Mainwaring in 1278, in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1334, in Cheshire, England, at the age of 69.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Christiana de Birtles est née en 1265, à Over, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Henry de Birtles, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Christian of Birties, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Roger de Mainwaring en 1278, à Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1334, à Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 69 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Christiana de Birtles 1265 in Over, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Henry de Birtles 30 und ihre Mutter Christian of Birties 25. Sie hat 1278 in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Roger de Mainwaring geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1334 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Cheshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Christiana de Birtles è nata il nel 1265 nel Over, Cheshire, England, sua padre, Henry de Birtles, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Christian of Birties, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Roger de Mainwaring nel 1278, nel Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1334, nel Cheshire, England, all'età di 69 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Christiana de Birtlesが1265年にイギリスチェシュアイアオバーで生まれた時，父Henry de Birtlesは30歳，母Christian of Birtiesは25歳であった。1278年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアでRoger de Mainwaringと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1334年にイギリスチェシュアイアで69歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Christiana de Birtles(이)가 1265년 영국 체실르 버에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henry de Birtles(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Christian of Birties(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1278년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르에서 Roger de Mainwaring(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1334년 영국 체실르에서 69세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Christiana de Birtles nasceu em 1265, em Over, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Henry de Birtles, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Christian of Birties, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Roger de Mainwaring em 1278, em Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1334, em Cheshire, Inglaterra, com 69 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Christiana de Birtles родилась в 1265 г. в местности овир, чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени Henry de Birtles было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Christian of Birties, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Roger de Mainwaring в 1278 г. в местности чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1334 г. в местности чешир, Англия в возрасте 69 лет.
